subcodes.first_line: O Dhabih! Forget not the bounty of thy Lord, and turn not unto tribulation. By My life, through it hath My Cause been exalted throughout the ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ذبیح لاتنس فضل ربک و لاتلتفت الی البلا لعمری به علا امری فی القرون
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @predictions and prophecies
